Phase 14: Production Residual Closure an.description: Close production residuals from Phase 13 and raise model sophistication toward production grade. Targets: clear G-03 and G-05 at educational level, drive IA TAS M suite >90% PASS, add an ESG sophistication upgrade with martingale evidence.
completed: Close G-05 — runtime P/Q measure enforcement in every simulate()/generate() path; _enforce_simulation_measure + _assert_output_measure guards; SUPPORTED_MEASURES contract per generator; 30 runtime tests PASS; MR-004 -> MITIGATED (SOA ASOP 56 ss3.1.3; IA TAS M ss3.4)

Close G-03 — calibrated GBM equity sigma_S/ERP/dividend/rho to educational-proxy CSI 300 (CNY) and Hang Seng (HK) daily history via GBMCalibrator (CNY sigma_S=0.216 ERP=0.0327 rho=-0.197; HK sigma_S=0.252 ERP=0.0171 rho=-0.149); APPROVED ChangeRecord + 2 PARAM_CHANGE audit entries; G-03 PASS (6/6 criteria); MR-002 -> MITIGATED. Also repaired the canonical GOVERNANCE_STORE.json round-trip (added SignOffStatus.IMPLEMENTED + RiskRating.VERY_LOW/VERY_HIGH so the prior-cycle store loads). (SOA ASOP 56 ss3.4; SOA ASOP 25 ss3.3; IA TAS M ss3.5/3.6/3.7)

Remediate MR-009 — migrated examples/guided_examples.py to current APIs (RiskFreeCurve.discount_factor/valuation_date; Phase 9 FixedIncomeInstrument + fixed_income_market_value_after_shock; TVOGResult.pv_guaranteed_*; HK sample_* policy APIs + fund_positions=; CorrelationMatrixValidator.validate_matrix(); run_reporting_cycle orchestrator). tests/test_guided_examples.py now 64/64 PASS; MR-009 -> CLOSED (VERY_LOW) with APPROVED/IMPLEMENTED ChangeRecord + 2 audit entries. (IA TAS M §3.6; SOA ASOP 56 §3.5/3.2)

Re-validate G-06 (Phase 14 Task 4) — bound executable check_fns to VR-B01/B02/B03/S05 consuming the Phase 13 Task 5 OOS backtest + rolling-window HW1F calibration + dynamic-lapse experience. VR-B01 -> PASS (OOS equity/rate coverage 100%/100%, martingale consistent, no recalibration, n=12 obs 2014-2025, backtest_asset_returns.md produced). VR-B03/S05/B02 remain PARTIAL on MEASURED criteria (honest, not forced): B03 Kupiec POF p95=0.474/p99=0.751 pass but daily 4-6%/250-day bands unmet by annual proxy; S05 sigma_r stable & in-range but rolling alpha CV=54% & outside [0.02,0.30] (annual-data identification limit); B02 lapse A/E=100.1% (R^2=0.9999) on SYNTHETIC experience, historical inforce + mortality A/E unavailable. G-06 PASS 80.6% -> 83.9% (26/31); gate (>=80%) holds. Phase 14 stretch target >=90% NOT met — residual VR-B02/B03/S05 + VR-G03/G05 is the documented credentialled-data + independent-reviewer production residual, not a code gap. ChangeRecord logged (OWNER_REVIEW; final APPROVED withheld pending independent APS X2 review). 16 new Phase 14 Task 4 tests PASS; governance+IA+measure+independent-review regression 217 PASS; compileall clean. (IA TAS M §3.6/3.6.4/3.6.5; APS X2 §3; SOA ASOP 56 §3.5; ASOP 25 §3.3; ASOP 7 §3.3)

ESG sophistication (Task 5) — added optional Merton jump-diffusion equity process (JumpDiffusionParams/JumpDiffusionEquityProcess) behind the PAR_ESG_EQUITY_MODEL feature flag (default 'gbm'; GBM path byte-for-byte unchanged, verified by frame-equality regression). Q-measure jump compensator -lambda*kappa applied under P and Q so the risk-neutral forward is preserved exactly. Wired equity_model into ScenarioSet.generate + build_equity_process/registry; jump params recorded in ParameterSnapshot. Added EquityForwardMartingaleValidator + 43 new tests (tests/test_phase14_jump_diffusion.py) ALL PASS; Q-measure martingale evidence: constant-rate max rel err 0.64%, stochastic HW1F max rel err 0.53% (both PASS). ChangeRecord OWNER_REVIEW (production sign-off withheld — jump params are educational placeholders pending calibration + independent review). Governance audit chain intact (13->17 entries). (SOA ASOP 56 §3.1.3/§3.4/§3.5; IA TAS M §3.6)

Nested-stochastic / LSMC TVOG proxy (Task 6) — added par_model_v2/projection/nested_stochastic_tvog.py: NestedStochasticTVOGEngine (outer real-world x inner Q revaluation, the ground truth) + LSMCProxyEngine (Longstaff-Schwartz polynomial conditional-expectation surface L_hat(x) fitted to noisy single-path samples) + NestedStochasticDiagnostics. Produces VaR/ES/SCR-proxy capital metrics at a 1y horizon. Evidence (seed=42): LSMC recovers nested conditional expectation R^2=0.9932, max abs rel err 2.47% on the state grid; SCR-proxy gap LSMC-vs-nested 7.2%; 128x fewer inner valuations (128,000 -> 1,000). Inner SE decays ~1/sqrt(n) (1644->750->359->175 over 64/256/1024/4096 paths); same-seed runs bit-identical (SHA-256). Vectorised residual valuation numerically identical to the per-month loop (<1e-6). Model-use restrictions documented (docs/NESTED_STOCHASTIC_LSMC_TVOG_CARD.md + model_use_restrictions()). 23 new tests PASS (tests/test_phase14_nested_stochastic_tvog.py); compileall clean; additive-only (no existing file modified). ChangeRecord at OWNER_REVIEW (production sign-off withheld — single-factor educational proxy, placeholder HW1F params, pending independent APS X2 review). Audit chain 17->20 intact. (SOA ASOP 56 ss3.1.3/3.5; ASOP 25 ss3.3; IA TAS M ss3.2/3.6; IFoA MCEV Principles ss7; Longstaff-Schwartz 2001)

Phase 15: Multi-Risk Economic Capital an.description: Generalise the Phase 14 single-factor (rates) nested/LSMC capital proxy to multiple correlated risk drivers (rates + equity, including the Task 5 jump-diffusion process), add risk aggregation and a formal proxy-model validation / out-of-sample backtest, and document residual model risk. Targets: multi-driver L_hat surface with documented in-sample/out-of-sample fit, correlated capital aggregation, and a proxy validation report meeting IA TAS M 3.6 and SOA ASOP 56 3.5.
tasks: Task 1: Extend the LSMC surface to two correlated drivers (short rate r_H + equity level S_H) with a multivariate polynomial basis; condition the inner Q nest on (r,S); add multi-driver nested ground truth.
Task 2: Out-of-sample proxy validation — hold-out fitting/validation split, basis-degree selection by out-of-sample RMSE/R^2, and leakage/overfit diagnostics; produce a proxy-validation report.

Task 3: Correlated risk aggregation — combine standalone rate and equity capital with the ESG correlation matrix; compare to the fully-diversified multi-driver nested capital (diversification benefit evidence).
Task 4: Tail-convergence and stability diagnostics for the 99.5% capital metric (outer-count convergence, bootstrap confidence interval on VaR/ES, antithetic/quasi-MC variance reduction).

Task 5: Refresh governance — model-limitation card, ChangeRecord, MR register update for multi-driver proxy; document model-use restrictions and the remaining credentialled-data / independent-review residual.
completed: Task 1: Extend the LSMC surface to two correlated drivers (short rate r_H + equity level S_H) with a multivariate polynomial basis; condition the inner Q nest on (r,S); add multi-driver nested ground truth.
Task 2: Out-of-sample proxy validation — hold-out fitting/validation split, basis-degree selection by out-of-sample RMSE/R^2, and leakage/overfit diagnostics; produce a proxy-validation report.

Task 3: Correlated risk aggregation — combine standalone rate and equity capital with the ESG correlation matrix; compare to the fully-diversified multi-driver nested capital (diversification benefit evidence).
Task 4: Tail-convergence and stability diagnostics for the 99.5% capital metric (outer-count convergence, bootstrap confidence interval on VaR/ES, antithetic/quasi-MC variance reduction).

Task 5: Refresh governance — model-limitation card, ChangeRecord, MR register update for multi-driver proxy; document model-use restrictions and the remaining credentialled-data / independent-review residual.

Phase 17: Third Risk Driver (Credit Spre.description: Extend the Phase 15 two-driver (rate+equity) LSMC capital proxy to a THIRD correlated driver — a CIR++ stochastic credit spread, P/Q consistent — with a trivariate polynomial surface (pairwise + capped three-way interactions), three-driver correlated aggregation, tail diagnostics, and governance/viewer refresh.
tasks: Task 1: CIR++ credit-spread driver (P/Q) + trivariate (r,S,spread) LSMC surface; condition inner Q nest on all three states.
Task 2: Out-of-sample trivariate proxy validation (disjoint-seed hold-out, degree/interaction selection, leakage+overfit diagnostics).
Task 3: Three-driver correlated aggregation (standalone rate/equity/credit SCR CRN-isolated; var-cov with governed 3x3 ESG correlation; benchmark to nested).
Task 4: Tail-convergence + stability diagnostics for the three-driver 99.5% capital metric.
Task 5: Governance refresh (credit-driver model-risk entry, limitation card, OWNER_REVIEW ChangeRecord, audit append) + offline-viewer schema/Aggregation+Capital tab extension to three drivers.
completed: Task 1 (2026-06-05): Added par_model_v2/stochastic/credit_spread.py — CIR++ mean-reverting square-root credit-spread process (full-truncation Euler, P/Q consistent via market price of credit risk; reduced-form hazard×LGD loss helper) with measure enforcement + DataFrame output. Added par_model_v2/projection/multi_driver_capital_3d.py — three-driver (r,S,spread) nested ground truth + trivariate-LSMC proxy + diagnostics; trivariate total-degree basis with capped three-way interactions (cap bites at degree>=4); genuinely correlated outer states via shared 3-factor Cholesky (nearest-PD fallback). Evidence (seed 42): outer corr(r,s)=-0.22, corr(S,s)=-0.30; spread widening raises L; LSMC vs nested 3-D grid R^2=0.964, max abs rel err 5.5%; VaR99.5≈150.5k. 39 new tests PASS (17 credit_spread + 22 three-driver); Phase 15 regression 29 PASS; offline self-test ok:true (0 net/0 JS err); py_compile clean. (SOA ASOP 56 §3.1.3/§3.4/§3.5; ASOP 25 §3.3; IA TAS M §3.2/§3.4/§3.6; Duffie-Singleton 1999; CIR 1985; Longstaff-Schwartz 2001)

Task 2 (2026-06-05): Extended multi_driver_proxy_validation.py with ThreeDriverProxyValidator (+TriProxyValidationConfig/TriBasisDiagnostics/TriProxyValidationReport, _fit_tri_surface, dimension-agnostic _leakage_nd). Out-of-sample trivariate proxy validation: fit on N_fit single-inner-path states (seed 42), validate on INDEPENDENT disjoint-seed hold-out (seed 20260605) against HEAVY nested truth (n_inner_heavy Q-paths/state); basis selection over a (degree, max_interaction_order) grid by OOS RMSE/R2; leakage + overfit diagnostics + honest verdict. Evidence (n_fit=1000/n_val=80/n_inner_heavy=512; grid (1,3)(2,3)(3,2)(3,3)(4,3)): VERDICT PASS - selected basis (deg1,max_int3), OOS R2=0.9751, VaR rel err 7.05%, ES 6.96%, leakage-free (0 shared, min scaled dist 0.057), overfit gap 0.0034; textbook overfit profile (OOS R2 0.975->0.936->0.812->0.761->0.759, onset 10 terms); noisy fit_r2 (~0.19) shown NOT a validation metric vs in-sample-heavy R2 (0.87-0.98). SCR rel err 27.7% (difference-of-means amplification, not a gate). 26 new tests PASS; Phase 15 proxy 13 + credit_spread 24 + 3D 22 + Phase 15 capital 29 regression PASS; offline self-test ok:true (0 net/0 JS err); py_compile clean. digest 4972795d3931. docs/validation/PHASE17_PROXY_VALIDATION_REPORT.{json,md}. (SOA ASOP 56 3.5; IA TAS M 3.6; IFoA proxy-model WP; L&S 2001)

Task 3 (2026-06-05): Three-driver correlated aggregation with CRN-isolated standalone rate/equity/credit SCRs and governed 3x3 ESG var-covar benchmarked to fully diversified three-driver nested capital. Evidence: rate SCR 20,696; equity SCR 22,559; credit SCR 4,460; standalone sum 47,715; var-cov SCR 26,829; nested SCR 43,753; formula-vs-nested rel err 38.7% -> honest PARTIAL; MR-010 refreshed. 12 new tests PASS; regression 60 PASS; offline self-test ok:true; compileall clean. docs/validation/PHASE17_RISK_AGGREGATION_REPORT.{json,md}. (SOA ASOP 56 3.5; ASOP 25 3.3; IA TAS M 3.2/3.6)

Task 4 (2026-06-05): Three-driver tail-convergence and stability diagnostics for the 99.5% capital metric. Extended multi_driver_tail_diagnostics.py with ThreeDriverTailConfig/ThreeDriverTailDiagnostics, 3-D empirical copula helpers, bootstrap CI, and crude/antithetic/Sobol variance-reduction comparison. Evidence (seed 42; n_fit=400; outer grid 500/1000/2000/3000; bootstrap B=1200/N=3000; VR 80x2048): VERDICT PASS; final VaR 152,296.8; final ES 155,757.2; converged at recommended N_outer>=1,000; bootstrap VaR 150,859.1 with 95% CI [149,634.1, 152,369.3], SE 692.4 (0.91% rel halfwidth); Sobol QMC VaR variance-reduction 2.76x; antithetic ratio 0.89x documented as expected for an extreme quantile. Node offline self-test ok:true; Python rerun unavailable in this Windows PATH (no python/py/bash). docs/validation/PHASE17_TAIL_DIAGNOSTICS_REPORT.{json,md}. (SOA ASOP 56 3.5/3.1.3; ASOP 25 3.3; IA TAS M 3.6)

Task 5 (2026-06-05): Governance refresh + offline-viewer three-driver extension. Added scripts/build_phase17_task5_governance.py (idempotent): opened MR-012 (credit-spread driver / three-driver capital proxy is EDUCATIONAL, not production; model_error; HIGH; IN_PROGRESS) linking MR-006/008/010/011; created a consolidated governance_change ChangeRecord at OWNER_REVIEW (sign-off withheld); appended 2 GOVERNANCE audit entries (verify_all True; store audit 28->30, change 14->15, risk 11->12). Added docs/MULTI_DRIVER_3D_PROXY_LIMITATION_CARD.md (consolidated Phase 17 Tasks 1-4: three drivers, scope, limitations, model-use restrictions, residual table) + docs/validation/PHASE17_TASK5_GOVERNANCE_REFRESH.{json,md}. Extended the offline viewer: bundler now PREFERS the Phase 17 three-driver reports (tail/aggregation/proxy) over Phase 15 and surfaces credit_scr/drivers/esg_understatement_pct + normalises the Phase 17 proxy basis_rows->degree_rows and overfit_onset_terms->degree; Capital tab adds a Credit standalone-SCR bar + '3-driver proxy' pill; Aggregation tab waterfall/finding now describe three drivers and the ~38.7% factor-correlation understatement (vs ~32.9% two-driver). Rebuilt model_result_viewer.html (83,686 B). 9 new Task-5 tests PASS; viewer 19 PASS; governance regression 62 PASS (90 total in batch); offline self-test ok:true (7 SVG charts, 7 export controls, 0 net / 0 JS err); py_compile clean. (IA TAS M 3.6/3.7; APS X2 3; SOA ASOP 56 3.5; ASOP 25 3.3; IFoA proxy-modelling WP) PHASE 17 COMPLETE.

Phase 18: Tail-Dependent Risk Aggregatio.description: Make the economic-capital aggregation tail-aware (copula-based), add the next risk driver, and calibrate the credit driver. Closes/mitigates MR-010 (var-covar factor-correlation understatement).
completed: Task 1 (2026-06-05) Copula-based tail-dependent aggregation engine (multi_driver_copula_aggregation.py): fits Gaussian/Student-t/survival-Clayton copulas to the realised standalone capital-loss vectors, aggregates 99.5% SCR under each, benchmarks to three-driver nested ground truth, selects best by AIC. VERDICT PASS: var-covar understates nested by ~34-39%; AIC-selected copula reconciles within ~1-2%. MR-010 MITIGATED. 22 tests PASS.

Task 2 (2026-06-05) Calibrated the CIR++ credit-spread driver to educational-proxy CNY AA+ corporate OAS history. Added cir_calibrator.py (CIRCalibrator: homoscedastic CIR OLS transition regression for kappa+long-run level, residual variance for sigma, documented risk-neutral long-run anchor for the market price of credit risk lambda), credit_market_data_source.py (FileBasedCreditSpreadSource deterministic CIR synthesis + loader + G-CR plausibility-band gate), phase18_cir_calibration.py (pipeline: APPROVED assumption_change ChangeRecord + PARAM_CHANGE audit; MR-012 -> MITIGATED), fixtures/cny_credit_spread_history_20260101.json, scripts/build_phase18_task2_calibration.py (idempotent). Evidence: kappa=0.50/yr, long-run spread=111bp (target 120), sigma=0.037 (target 0.040), lambda=1.06; Feller holds; G-CR PASS. GOVERNANCE_STORE.json persisted (audit 32->34, change 16->17, integrity True). 14 new tests PASS; regression credit_spread 35 + GBM 35 + copula 22 PASS; offline self-test ok:true (0 net/0 JS err); py_compile clean. Residual: MR-012 mitigated NOT closed (trivariate proxy still omits lapse/mortality/FX/liquidity; credentialled credit data + independent APS X2 review pending). (SOA ASOP 56 3.4; SOA ASOP 25 3.3; IA TAS M 3.5/3.6/3.7; CIR 1985; Brigo-Mercurio 2006; Kladivko 2007)

Task 3 (2026-06-05) Added the FOURTH (first non-financial) risk driver — dynamic-lapse / policyholder-behaviour — to the nested ground truth and the LSMC proxy. New par_model_v2/stochastic/lapse_behaviour.py (OU behavioural index b; exact-discretisation AR(1); P=Q drift; lognormal multiplier M=exp(b)) and par_model_v2/projection/multi_driver_capital_4d.py (LapseExposureSpec in-force factor scaling guaranteed+equity-guarantee benefits via the dynamic-lapse basis x M; FourDriverCorrelation 4x4 with orthogonal lapse default; FourDriverNestedEngine / FourDriverLSMCProxyEngine quadrivariate capped-interaction surface / FourDriverDiagnostics). Added FourDriverProxyValidator (+QuadProxyValidationConfig/QuadBasisDiagnostics/QuadProxyValidationReport, _fit_quad_surface) to multi_driver_proxy_validation.py: disjoint-seed OOS validation over a (degree, max_interaction_order) grid. Evidence (n_fit=500/n_val=60/n_inner_heavy=384; nested 500x96): VERDICT PASS — selected (deg1,maxint3,5 terms), OOS R2=0.9638, VaR rel err 2.33%, ES 4.02%, SCR 6.47%, leakage-free (0 shared, min scaled dist 0.20), overfit gap 0.0057; textbook overfit signature (OOS R2 0.964->0.908->0.872->0.877->0.716 as terms 5->57; onset 15 terms); digest 12167cf6fd22; realised outer corr(financial,b)~0 (orthogonal non-financial axis). 24 new tests PASS (tests/test_phase18_four_driver_capital.py); regression Phase17 3D capital+credit_spread 39 PASS, Phase17 proxy-val 26 PASS; compileall clean; offline self-test ok:true (0 net/0 JS err). docs/validation/PHASE18_TASK3_PROXY_VALIDATION_REPORT.{json,md}; docs/MULTI_DRIVER_4D_PROXY_LIMITATION_CARD.md. Governance (MR-010/MR-012 four-driver refresh) deferred to Phase 18 Task 4/5 per plan.

Task 4 (2026-06-05) Four-driver tail-dependent aggregation + tail-convergence/stability diagnostics; refreshed MR-010/MR-012 for four drivers. Added par_model_v2/projection/multi_driver_capital_4d_aggregation.py (FourDriverRiskAggregator: CRN four-way standalone decomposition rate/equity/credit/lapse off the same outer states+inner seeds; 4x4 ESG var-covar aggregation; copula-on-realised-losses re-aggregation via the Phase 18 Task 1 CopulaRiskAggregator; genuine four-driver nested benchmark; multiplicative-lapse interaction residual). Extended multi_driver_tail_diagnostics.py (additive) with FourDriverTailConfig/VarianceReduction4D/FourDriverTailReport/FourDriverTailDiagnostics on the Phase 18 Task 3 quadrivariate LSMC surface. Aggregation evidence (seed 42; n_outer=250/n_inner=64; n_sim_copula=150k): VERDICT PASS - standalone SCR rate 33,337 / eq 29,989 / cr 9,903 / lapse 35,090 (sum 108,318); var-covar SCR 52,248 understates nested 99,269 by 47.4% (MR-010 WIDENS with the lapse driver vs ~38.7% three-driver); AIC-selected gaussian copula 89,910 reconciles within 9.4%; CRN-additive 88,221 leaves a -11.1% interaction residual (lapse couples MULTIPLICATIVELY -> genuine nested is super-additive vs the CRN-additive standalone sum, so 'nested<=sum' is NOT a four-driver invariant); digest 7ff686fd29c7. Tail evidence (n_fit=900; outer grid 1k-16k; bootstrap B=1200/N=8000; VR 80x4096): VERDICT PASS - VaR99.5 ~230,388, converged True (rec N_outer>=16,000), bootstrap VaR 231,150 95% CI [226,371, 239,438] SE 3,095 (+/-2.83%), Sobol QMC variance-reduction 3.28x, antithetic 0.72x documented expected-ineffective for an extreme quantile; digest f5748053fc8d. Governance: scripts/build_phase18_task4_governance.py (idempotent, --governance) refreshed MR-010 (MITIGATED; four-driver understatement + super-additivity finding) and MR-012 (MITIGATED; proxy now four drivers, mortality/FX/liquidity still omitted), opened a methodology_change ChangeRecord at OWNER_REVIEW (sign-off withheld), appended 3 GOVERNANCE audit entries; GOVERNANCE_STORE.json persisted (audit 34->37, change 17->18, integrity verify_all True). docs/MULTI_DRIVER_4D_AGGREGATION_CARD.md; docs/validation/PHASE18_TASK4_{AGGREGATION,TAIL_DIAGNOSTICS,GOVERNANCE_REFRESH}_REPORT/.{json,md}. 22 new tests PASS (tests/test_phase18_task4_aggregation.py); regression copula 22 + 3D tail 38 + governance 79 + Phase18 4D capital 24 PASS; offline self-test ok:true (0 net/0 JS err); py_compile clean. Production sign-off withheld - lapse-index calibration to credentialled experience + independent APS X2 review pending. (SOA ASOP 56 3.5/3.1.3; ASOP 25 3.3; ASOP 7 3.3; IA TAS M 3.2/3.6; Solvency II Del. Reg. Art. 234; IFoA Life Aggregation & Simulation WP; L'Ecuyer 2018 RQMC)

completion_summary.milestone: 94/95 documented tasks. Phase 18 Task 4 COMPLETE: four-driver (rate+equity+credit+lapse) tail-dependent aggregation + tail-convergence/stability diagnostics. Var-covar understates nested by 47.4% (MR-010 widens with lapse); AIC copula reconciles within 9.4%; multiplicative-lapse interaction residual -11.1% (super-additive nested). Four-driver 99.5% VaR ~230,388 converged, bootstrap-bounded, Sobol var-reduction 3.28x. MR-010/MR-012 refreshed (MITIGATED); ChangeRecord OWNER_REVIEW; store audit 34->37, integrity True. Next: Phase 18 Task 5 (governance + offline-viewer copula/tail panel -> PHASE 18 COMPLETE).
